message:
🐛 Fix analytics API crash: remove unregistered card_id GA4 dimension (#2180)

customEvent:card_id is not registered as a GA4 custom dimension, causing
query 20 to return 400 and breaking the entire analytics API. Removes
the query and card error breakdown UI. Keeps card_id as a sent parameter
(for future use once registered) and preserves [cardId] prefix in
error_detail for backward compatibility.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
